name: Catalogizer Entity Management Test Bank
description: Entity management tests for CRUD, hierarchy, search, duplicates, metadata, browsing, filtering, and statistics

test_cases.name: Create movie entity

steps.name: Send create entity request
steps.expected: 201 Created with entity ID in response body
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'movie', title 'Test Movie', year 2025

steps.name: Verify entity exists
steps.expected: Entity returned with correct title, type, and year

test_cases.expected_result: Movie entity created and retrievable

test_cases.name: Create TV show entity

steps.name: Send create entity request
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'tv_show', title 'Test TV Show'

test_cases.expected_result: TV show entity created successfully

test_cases.name: Create music album entity

steps.name: Send create entity request
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'music_album', title 'Test Album', artist 'Test Artist'

steps.name: Verify entity metadata
steps.expected: Entity has correct type and title

test_cases.expected_result: Music album entity created successfully

test_cases.name: Create game entity
test_cases.expected_result: Game entity created successfully

test_cases.name: Create software entity

steps.name: Send create entity request
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'software', title 'Test Software v2.0'

test_cases.expected_result: Software entity created successfully

test_cases.name: Create book entity

steps.name: Send create entity request
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'book', title 'Test Book', year 2024

steps.name: Verify entity
steps.expected: Entity type is 'book' with correct year

test_cases.expected_result: Book entity created successfully

test_cases.name: Create comic entity

steps.name: Send create entity request
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'comic', title 'Test Comic Issue 1'

test_cases.expected_result: Comic entity created successfully

test_cases.name: Create music artist entity
test_cases.expected_result: Music artist entity created successfully

test_cases.name: Create song entity
test_cases.expected_result: Song entity created successfully

test_cases.name: Create TV season entity

steps.name: Create TV season
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'tv_season', title 'Season 1', parent_id set to TV show ID

steps.name: Verify parent link
steps.expected: Entity type is 'tv_season' with parent_id referencing the TV show

test_cases.expected_result: TV season entity created with parent link

test_cases.name: Create TV episode entity

steps.name: Create TV episode
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'tv_episode', title 'Pilot', parent_id set to season ID

steps.name: Verify parent link
steps.expected: Entity type is 'tv_episode' with parent_id referencing the season

test_cases.expected_result: TV episode entity created with parent link to season

test_cases.name: Reject entity creation with invalid media type

steps.name: Send create with unknown type
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with error describing invalid type

steps.name: Verify no entity created
steps.expected: No entity with type 'podcast' in results

test_cases.expected_result: Invalid media type rejected with clear error

test_cases.name: Reject entity creation with missing title

steps.name: Send create without title
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with validation error for missing title

test_cases.expected_result: Missing title rejected with validation error

test_cases.name: Full TV show hierarchy: show to season to episode

steps.name: Create Season 1
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'tv_season', title 'Season 1', parent_id = show ID

steps.name: Create Episode 1
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'tv_episode', title 'Pilot', parent_id = season ID

test_cases.expected_result: Three-level TV hierarchy navigable via parent-child queries

test_cases.name: Music hierarchy: artist to album to song

steps.name: Create album
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'music_album', title 'Abbey Road', parent_id = artist ID

steps.name: Create song
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'song', title 'Come Together', parent_id = album ID

steps.name: Traverse hierarchy
steps.expected: Album under artist, song under album
steps._original_action: GET /api/v1/entities/{artist_id}/children then GET children of album

test_cases.expected_result: Three-level music hierarchy navigable

test_cases.name: Query children of entity with no children

steps.name: Query children
steps.expected: Empty array returned, not an error

test_cases.expected_result: Empty children list returned for leaf entities

test_cases.name: Multiple seasons under one TV show

steps.name: Create Season 1
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'tv_season', title 'Season 1', parent_id = show ID

steps.name: Create Season 2
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'tv_season', title 'Season 2', parent_id = show ID

steps.name: Create Season 3
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'tv_season', title 'Season 3', parent_id = show ID

test_cases.expected_result: Multiple seasons listed under parent show

test_cases.name: Multiple episodes under one season

steps.name: Create 5 episodes
steps.action: POST 5 episodes with parent_id = season ID, titles Episode 1 through 5

test_cases.expected_result: Multiple episodes listed under parent season

test_cases.name: Search entities by title

steps.name: Create entities with known titles
steps.action: Create movie 'The Matrix' and book 'The Matrix Comics'

test_cases.expected_result: Title search returns matching entities

test_cases.name: Search entities by type
test_cases.expected_result: Type filter returns only matching entities

test_cases.name: Search entities by year

steps.name: Create entities with different years
steps.action: Create movie year 2020, movie year 2025, book year 2020

steps.name: Filter by year 2020
steps.expected: Two entities (movie and book from 2020) returned

test_cases.expected_result: Year filter returns matching entities

test_cases.name: Search with combined title and type filter

steps.name: Create entities
steps.action: Create movie 'Inception', book 'Inception: The Art', game 'Inception'

test_cases.expected_result: Combined search narrows results correctly

test_cases.name: Search returns empty for non-existent title
test_cases.expected_result: Empty array returned, not an error

test_cases.name: Search is case-insensitive
test_cases.expected_result: Search is case-insensitive

test_cases.name: Detect duplicate entity by title and type and year

steps.name: Create duplicate
steps.expected: 409 Conflict or warning indicating duplicate detected

test_cases.expected_result: Duplicate entity detected and flagged

test_cases.name: Same title different type is not a duplicate

steps.name: Create book with same title
steps.expected: 201 Created (not a duplicate since different type)

test_cases.expected_result: Same title with different type allowed

test_cases.name: Same title different year is not a duplicate
test_cases.expected_result: Same title with different year allowed as separate entity

test_cases.name: Update entity title
test_cases.expected_result: Entity title updated successfully

test_cases.name: Update entity metadata

steps.name: Verify metadata
steps.expected: Metadata fields present with correct values

test_cases.expected_result: Entity metadata updated and retrievable

test_cases.name: Update entity year

steps.name: Create entity with year
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'movie', title 'Year Test', year 2020

test_cases.expected_result: Entity year updated correctly

test_cases.name: Update non-existent entity returns 404
test_cases.expected_result: 404 returned for non-existent entity update

test_cases.name: Delete entity
test_cases.expected_result: Entity deleted and no longer retrievable

test_cases.name: Delete parent entity cascades or blocks

steps.name: Create TV show with season and episode
steps.action: Create full hierarchy: show > season > episode

steps.name: Delete parent show
steps.expected: Either cascade deletes children or 409 Conflict if children exist

steps.name: Verify outcome
steps.expected: Consistent state: all deleted or parent still present with error

test_cases.expected_result: Parent deletion handled consistently with hierarchy

test_cases.name: Delete non-existent entity returns 404
test_cases.expected_result: 404 returned for non-existent entity deletion

test_cases.name: Browse entities with default pagination

steps.name: Create 30 entities
steps.action: POST 30 movie entities with sequential titles

steps.name: Verify pagination metadata
steps.action: Check response headers or body for total count and page info

test_cases.expected_result: Paginated entity listing with correct counts

test_cases.name: Browse entities second page

steps.name: Ensure 30+ entities exist
steps.action: playwright: assertVisible text=or create sufficient entities

test_cases.expected_result: Second page returns different entities than first

test_cases.name: Browse beyond last page returns empty
test_cases.expected_result: Empty result for page beyond data range

test_cases.name: Browse entities sorted by title
test_cases.expected_result: Entities sorted alphabetically by title

test_cases.name: Browse entities sorted by creation date

steps.name: Create entities sequentially
steps.action: Create entity A, then B, then C with short delays

steps.name: Sort by created_at descending
steps.expected: C first, then B, then A

test_cases.expected_result: Entities sorted by creation date

test_cases.name: Filter entities by type movie
test_cases.expected_result: Only movie entities returned when filtered

test_cases.name: Filter entities by type book

steps.name: Ensure mixed entities exist
steps.action: playwright: assertVisible text=movies, books, games in database
steps._original_action: Verify movies, books, games in database

test_cases.expected_result: Only book entities returned when filtered

test_cases.name: Filter entities by type game
test_cases.expected_result: Only game entities returned when filtered

test_cases.name: Filter entities by type tv_show

steps.name: Filter by tv_show
steps.expected: Only tv_show entities returned (not seasons or episodes)

test_cases.expected_result: Only top-level TV show entities returned

test_cases.name: Filter by invalid type returns empty
test_cases.expected_result: Invalid type filter handled gracefully

test_cases.name: Entity count by type

steps.name: Request statistics
steps.expected: Breakdown by type: movie=5, book=3, game=2

test_cases.expected_result: Entity statistics show correct counts per type

test_cases.name: Total entity count

steps.name: Request entity count
steps.expected: Total entity count matches expected number

test_cases.expected_result: Total count matches number of created entities

test_cases.name: Entity statistics with empty database
test_cases.expected_result: Zero counts returned for empty database

test_cases.name: Associate scanned file with entity

steps.name: Create movie entity
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with type 'movie', title 'File Association Test'

steps.name: Link file to entity
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities/{id}/files with file_id from scanned file

steps.name: Verify association
steps.expected: Linked file appears in entity file list

test_cases.expected_result: File linked to entity and visible in file list

test_cases.name: Multiple files associated with one entity
test_cases.expected_result: Multiple files linked to single entity

test_cases.name: Remove file association from entity

steps.name: Create entity with file
steps.action: Create entity and link a file

test_cases.expected_result: File association removed from entity

test_cases.name: Create entity collection

steps.name: Add entities to collection
steps.action: POST 3 movie entities to the collection

test_cases.expected_result: Collection created with entities

test_cases.name: Remove entity from collection
test_cases.expected_result: Entity removed from collection

test_cases.expected_result: Type filter works in web entity browser

steps.expected: Results filter in real-time or after submit

test_cases.name: Post-scan aggregation creates entities from files

steps.name: Trigger scan of storage root
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/scan with storage root containing media files

steps.name: Verify entities created
steps.expected: Entities automatically created from scanned file names

steps.name: Verify file associations
steps.action: Check that scanned files are linked to entities
steps.expected: Each scanned file associated with a recognized entity

test_cases.expected_result: Aggregation pipeline creates entities from scanned files

test_cases.name: Title parser extracts movie info from filename

steps.name: Verify parsed entity
steps.expected: Movie entity created with title 'The Matrix', year 1999

test_cases.expected_result: Title parser correctly extracts movie name and year

test_cases.name: Title parser extracts TV episode info from filename

steps.name: Verify hierarchy
steps.expected: TV show 'Breaking Bad' with Season 1 and Episode 1 in hierarchy

test_cases.expected_result: Title parser builds TV hierarchy from filename

test_cases.name: Aggregation detects duplicates during scan

steps.name: Scan directory with duplicate movie files
Verify single entity
steps.expected: One movie entity with two associated files

test_cases.expected_result: Duplicate files consolidated under single entity
